title: Software Engineer - Recent Grad - AI Native
company_focus: Universal payment layer for fiat and crypto currencies
description:
Are you passionate about solving complex challenges in the
fintech space? We’re looking for talented individuals to
join our dynamic startup, backed by Sequoia Capital. We’re
building the universal payment layer to unify all
currencies—fiat and crypto—so businesses and consumers can
transact seamlessly. If you're passionate about creating
innovative solutions in a dynamic, fast-paced environment,
we want to talk to you.

We are hiring an AI-Native Fullstack Engineer

Are you excited about building products at the intersection
of fintech and AI? We’re looking for an AI-native Fullstack
Engineer to join Breeze, a Sequoia-backed startup building
the universal payment layer to unify all currencies — fiat
and crypto — so businesses and consumers can transact
seamlessly.

In this role, you’ll work across the stack to design, build,
and ship AI-powered, product-facing experiences end to end.
You’ll partner closely with Product, Design, and Operations
to turn complex financial workflows into intuitive,
intelligent systems. This is a hands-on, product-centric
role where engineering decisions — including how we apply AI
— directly shape what our customers use every day.

This position is hybrid in NYC, with regular in-office
collaboration. This hire will be one of our first NYC-based
engineers.

What You’ll Do

- Build and scale user-facing fintech products that leverage
  AI as a core capability, not an afterthought.
- Own features end-to-end — from technical design and
  implementation to iteration based on user and model
  feedback.
- Develop in a fullstack environment using React.js and
  TypeScript on the frontend, and Node.js and TypeScript on
  the backend.
- Design and integrate AI-driven workflows (e.g., intelligent
  automation, decision support, agentic flows, or LLM-
  powered features).
- Partner closely with Product and Design to shape product
  requirements, UX decisions, and AI-driven interactions.
- Stay up to date with emerging AI technologies, tools, and
  best practices, and apply them pragmatically to real
  product problems.
- Design systems that are secure, scalable, and performant in
  a payments and financial context.
- Collaborate with Risk, Compliance, and Operations teams to
  ensure AI-powered workflows meet regulatory and
  operational needs.
- Communicate clearly with stakeholders and contribute to
  product planning and prioritization.
- Thrive in a fast-paced startup environment where speed,
  ownership, and quality all matter.

What We’re Looking For

- 1+ years of professional software engineering experience,
  this includes internships, co-ops, etc.
- Strong experience building product-driven, user-facing
  applications.
- Solid fullstack experience with React.js, Node.js, and
  TypeScript (or similar modern frameworks).
- Demonstrated experience building with AI-native tools or
  models (e.g., LLM APIs, embeddings, agents, prompt-driven
  workflows, model orchestration).
- Curiosity and fluency with modern AI trends, tools, and
  platforms — you actively experiment and stay current.
- Product mindset — you care deeply about usability, customer
  experience, and business impact.
- Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to own
  features from concept to launch.
- Excellent communication skills and comfort working cross-
  functionally with non-engineering partners.
- Familiarity with building scalable, reliable systems and
  modern web architectures.
- Bonus: experience applying AI in regulated environments
  (fintech, payments, risk, compliance) or working with
  financial APIs.

Our Culture

Fast-paced and dynamic – We’re a growing startup that moves
quickly. AI-forward – We embrace new technologies and expect
engineers to push how products are built. Ownership and
communication – We value people who take full ownership and
communicate clearly across teams. Continuous learning –
You’ll work alongside experts in fintech and payments while
staying at the forefront of applied AI.

Why Join Us

- Competitive salary + equity plan
- 21 days PTO
- Benefits: annual medical allowance, productivity budget, gym
  membership & wellness subsidy
- Annual team retreat trip
- Hybrid work environment in NYC
- Be part of a team backed by Sequoia Capital with a strong
  runway

Requirements

- 1+ years of relevant software engineering experience.
- Proficiency in modern fullstack development (React.js,
  Node.js, TypeScript).
- Hands-on experience building or integrating AI-powered
  features into production products.
- Strong product sensibility and experience building customer-
  facing features.
- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
- Work Authorization in the US - We are not supporting Visa
  sponsorship or transfers at this time.

Apply now and help us build the future of payments at a
global scale!
responsibilities: Build and scale user-facing fintech products that leverage AI as a core capability
Own features end-to-end from technical design and implementation to iteration based on user and model feedback
Develop fullstack applications using React.js and TypeScript on frontend, Node.js and TypeScript on backend
Design and integrate AI-driven workflows including intelligent automation, decision support, agentic flows, and LLM-powered features
Partner closely with Product and Design to shape product requirements, UX decisions, and AI-driven interactions
Stay up to date with emerging AI technologies, tools, and best practices and apply them pragmatically to real product problems
Design systems that are secure, scalable, and performant in a payments and financial context
Collaborate with Risk, Compliance, and Operations teams to ensure AI-powered workflows meet regulatory and operational needs
use_cases: Universal payment platform unifying fiat and crypto currencies for seamless transactions
Intelligent automation of complex financial workflows
AI-powered decision support systems for payment processing
Agentic flows for automated financial operations
Secure and compliant AI-driven payment workflows
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is an AI-native fullstack engineer role that involves
building AI-powered product-facing experiences end to end.
The responsibilities explicitly include designing and
integrating AI-driven workflows like intelligent automation,
decision support, agentic flows, and LLM-powered features
directly into the product. The hands-on work with LLM APIs,
embeddings, agents, and prompt-driven workflows indicates
direct involvement in building and deploying AI systems.
